rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Franz Steiner Verlag Wiesbaden GmbH In Bybliotheca Vaticana, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Ordinary of the mass and Anaphora of the Apostles
Fragment of a litany to the peace of the Church and king Lǝbna Dǝngǝl
Fragment of an untitled liturgical prayer
On the journey of Our Lady Mary to Egypt
On the computation of the maṭqǝʿ
Short praise to the Letter to the Romans and the Acts of the Apostles
On the computation of the maṭqǝʿ
Exhortation to hear the Miracles of Mary
Prayer to obtain the spiritual intelligence
